availability_zones.description: A list of availability zones where the Redshift cluster can be deployed.

cluster_type.description: The type of the Redshift cluster, such as multi-node or single-node.

cluster_version.description: The version of the Redshift cluster engine.

id.description: A unique identifier for the orderable Redshift cluster.

node_type.description: The type of node that the Redshift cluster uses.
